[+] Execution halted due to exception after 29 cycles.

=== ARCHITECTURAL STATE (CYCLE 29) ===
x0:    0 | x1:    0 | x2: -1200 | x3:    0 | x4: 1645 | x5:    0 | x6: -1450 | x7:    0 |

Branch Predictor Stats: 0/1 correct.
